{{infobox football tournament season
|title           = Copa do Brasil
|year            = 2001
|other_titles    = Copa do Brasil 2001
|image           =
|imagesize       = 250px
|caption         = 
|country         = Brazil
|dates           = March 14 - June 17
|num_teams       = 64
|champions       = [[Grêmio Foot-Ball Porto Alegrense|Grêmio (RS)]]
|runner-up       = [[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians (SP)]]
|matches         = 
|goals           = 
|top goal scorer = [[Washington (footballer, born 1 April 1975)|Washington Stecanela]] (12)
|player          = 
|prevseason      = [[2000 Copa do Brasil|2000]]
|nextseason      = [[2002 Copa do Brasil|2002]]
}}

The '''Copa do Brasil 2001''' was the 13th staging of the [[Copa do Brasil]]. 

The competition started on March 14, 2001 and concluded on June 13, 2001 with the second leg of the final, held at the [[Estádio do Morumbi]] in [[São Paulo]], in which [[Grêmio Foot-Ball Porto Alegrense|Grêmio]] lifted the trophy for the fourth time with a 3-1 victory over [[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians]].

[[Washington Stecanela Cerqueira|Washington]], of [[Associação Atlética Ponte Preta|Ponte Preta]], with 12 goals, was the competition's topscorer.

==Format==
The competition was disputed by 64 clubs in a [[Single-elimination tournament|knock-out]] format where all rounds were played over two legs and the [[away goals rule]] was used, but in the first two rounds if the away team won the first leg with an advantage of at least two goals, the second leg was not played and the club automatically qualified to the next round.

==Competition stages==
{{64TeamBracket 

| RD1-team01=[[River Atlético Clube|River (PI)]]
| RD1-score01=0
| RD1-team02='''[[Clube de Regatas do Flamengo|Flamengo (RJ)]]'''
| RD1-score02=2

| RD1-team03=[[Clube Náutico Capibaribe|Náutico (PE)]]
| RD1-score03=2 0
| RD1-team04='''[[ABC Futebol Clube|ABC (RN)]]'''
| RD1-score04=2 2

| RD1-team05=[[União Recreativa dos Trabalhadores|URT (MG)]]
| RD1-score05=2 0
| RD1-team06='''[[Mixto Esporte Clube|Mixto (MT)]]'''
| RD1-score06=1 2

| RD1-team07=[[Esporte Clube Comercial (MS)|Comercial (MS)]]
| RD1-score07=2 0
| RD1-team08='''[[Esporte Clube Juventude|Juventude (RS)]]'''
| RD1-score08=0 5

| RD1-team09=[[Desportiva Capixaba|Desportiva (ES)]]
| RD1-score09=2 0
| RD1-team10='''[[Coritiba Foot Ball Club|Coritiba (PR)]]'''
| RD1-score10=3 3

| RD1-team11='''[[Nacional Futebol Clube|Nacional (AM)]]'''
| RD1-score11=3 1
| RD1-team12=[[Paysandu Sport Club|Paysandú (PA)]]
| RD1-score12=0 1

| RD1-team13=[[Operário Futebol Clube (MS)|Operário (MS)]]
| RD1-score13=0
| RD1-team14='''[[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético (MG)]]'''
| RD1-score14=6

| RD1-team15=[[Americano Futebol Clube|Americano (RJ)]]
| RD1-score15=2
| RD1-team16='''[[Goiás Esporte Clube|Goiás (GO)]]'''
| RD1-score16=6

| RD1-team17=[[Cachoeiro Futebol Clube|Cachoeiro (ES)]]
| RD1-score17=0 1
| RD1-team18='''[[Fluminense Football Club|Fluminense (RJ)]]'''
| RD1-score18=1 2

| RD1-team19=[[J. Malucelli Futebol|Malutrom (PR)]]
| RD1-score19=1 0
| RD1-team20='''[[Sociedade Esportiva e Recreativa Juventude|Juventude (MT)]]'''
| RD1-score20=0 4

| RD1-team21=[[Villa Nova Atlético Clube|Villa Nova (MG)]]
| RD1-score21=3 1
| RD1-team22='''[[Grêmio Foot-Ball Porto Alegrense|Grêmio (RS)]]'''
| RD1-score22=2 4

| RD1-team23=[[Atlético Clube Lagartense|Lagartense (SE)]]
| RD1-score23=1 3
| RD1-team24='''[[Santa Cruz Futebol Clube|Santa Cruz (PE)]]'''
| RD1-score24=2 3

| RD1-team25=[[Guajará Esporte Clube|Guajará (RO)]]
| RD1-score25=1 0
| RD1-team26='''[[Rio Branco Football Club|Rio Branco (AC)]]'''
| RD1-score26=1 1

| RD1-team27=[[Agremiação Sportiva Arapiraquense|ASA (AL)]]
| RD1-score27=1 1
| RD1-team28='''[[Esporte Clube Vitória|Vitória (BA)]]'''
| RD1-score28=2 2

| RD1-team29='''[[Ceará Sporting Club|Ceará (CE)]]'''
| RD1-score29=3 2
| RD1-team30=[[Paraná Clube|Paraná (PR)]]
| RD1-score30=1 2

| RD1-team31=[[Botafogo Futebol Clube (PB)|Botafogo (PB)]]
| RD1-score31=0 0
| RD1-team32='''[[São Paulo Futebol Clube|São Paulo (SP)]]'''
| RD1-score32=1 10

| RD1-team33=[[Joinville Esporte Clube|Joinville (SC)]]
| RD1-score33=1
| RD1-team34='''[[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians (SP)]]'''
| RD1-score34=3

| RD1-team35='''[[Goiânia Esporte Clube|Goiânia (GO)]]'''
| RD1-score35=1 1
| RD1-team36=[[América Futebol Clube (MG)|América (MG)]]
| RD1-score36=1 0

| RD1-team37=[[Centro Sportivo Alagoano|CSA (AL)]]
| RD1-score37=3 1
| RD1-team38='''[[Sport Club do Recife|Sport (PE)]]'''
| RD1-score38=4 0

| RD1-team39=[[Moto Club de São Luís|Moto Clube (MA)]]
| RD1-score39=1 1
| RD1-team40='''[[Esporte Clube Flamengo|Flamengo (PI)]]'''
| RD1-score40=2 2

| RD1-team41=[[Figueirense Futebol Clube|Figueirense (SC)]]
| RD1-score41=2 1
| RD1-team42='''[[Associação Portuguesa de Desportos|Portuguesa (SP)]]'''
| RD1-score42=3 2

| RD1-team43=[[Atlético Rio Negro Clube (RR)|Rio Negro (RR)]]
| RD1-score43=1 0
| RD1-team44='''[[São Raimundo Esporte Clube (AM)|São Raimundo (AM)]]'''
| RD1-score44=2 6

| RD1-team45=[[Sociedade Esportiva e Recreativa Caxias do Sul|Caxias (RS)]]
| RD1-score45=0 1
| RD1-team46='''[[Guarani Futebol Clube|Guarani (SP)]]'''
| RD1-score46=1 4

| RD1-team47=[[Treze Futebol Clube|Treze (PB)]]
| RD1-score47=2 0 (pen: 2)
| RD1-team48='''[[Clube Atlético Paranaense|Atlético (PR)]]'''
| RD1-score48=0 2 (pen: 3)

| RD1-team49=[[Vila Nova Futebol Clube|Vila Nova (GO)]]
| RD1-score49=3 1
| RD1-team50='''[[Sport Club Internacional|Internacional (RS)]]'''
| RD1-score50=3 3

| RD1-team51=[[Sampaio Corrêa Futebol Clube|Sampaio Corrêa (MA)]]
| RD1-score51=0
| RD1-team52='''[[Fortaleza Esporte Clube|Fortaleza (CE)]]'''
| RD1-score52=2

| RD1-team53=[[América Futebol Clube (RN)|América (RN)]]
| RD1-score53=1
| RD1-team54='''[[Esporte Clube Bahia|Bahia (BA)]]'''
| RD1-score54=4

| RD1-team55=[[Associação Atlética Anapolina|Anapolina (GO)]]
| RD1-score55=1 1
| RD1-team56='''[[Santos Futebol Clube|Santos (SP)]]'''
| RD1-score56=2 5

| RD1-team57=[[Club Sportivo Sergipe|Sergipe (SE)]]
| RD1-score57=2 1
| RD1-team58='''[[Botafogo de Futebol e Regatas|Botafogo (RJ)]]'''
| RD1-score58=3 2

| RD1-team59='''[[Clube do Remo|Remo (PA)]]'''
| RD1-score59=1 3
| RD1-team60=[[Santos Futebol Clube (AP)|Santos (AP)]]
| RD1-score60=0 0

| RD1-team61=[[Palmas Futebol e Regatas|Palmas (TO)]]
| RD1-score61=0 0
| RD1-team62='''[[Sociedade Esportiva do Gama|Gama (DF)]]'''
| RD1-score62=0 2

| RD1-team63=[[Castanhal Esporte Clube|Castanhal (PA)]]
| RD1-score63=0 1
| RD1-team64='''[[Associação Atlética Ponte Preta|Ponte Preta (SP)]]'''
| RD1-score64=1 8


| RD2-team01='''Flamengo (RJ)'''
| RD2-score01=3
| RD2-team02=ABC (RN)
| RD2-score02=1

| RD2-team03=Mixto (MT)
| RD2-score03=0 1
| RD2-team04='''Juventude (RS)'''
| RD2-score04=3 1

| RD2-team05='''Coritiba (PR)'''
| RD2-score05=2 2
| RD2-team06=Nacional (AM)
| RD2-score06=2 1

| RD2-team07=Atlético (MG)
| RD2-score07=1 2
| RD2-team08='''Goiás (GO)'''
| RD2-score08=3 2

| RD2-team09='''Fluminense (RJ)'''
| RD2-score09=1 3
| RD2-team10=Juventude (MT)
| RD2-score10=4 0

| RD2-team11='''Grêmio (RS)'''
| RD2-score11=0 3
| RD2-team12=Santa Cruz (PE)
| RD2-score12=1 1

| RD2-team13=Rio Branco (AC)
| RD2-score13=0 0
| RD2-team14='''Vitória (BA)'''
| RD2-score14=0 3

| RD2-team15=Ceará (CE)
| RD2-score15=2
| RD2-team16='''São Paulo (SP)'''
| RD2-score16=4

| RD2-team17='''Corinthians (SP)'''
| RD2-score17=1 3
| RD2-team18=Goiânia (GO)
| RD2-score18=0 1

| RD2-team19=Sport (PE)
| RD2-score19=0 1
| RD2-team20='''Flamengo (PI)'''
| RD2-score20=2 0

| RD2-team21='''Portuguesa (SP)'''
| RD2-score21=0 3
| RD2-team22=São Raimundo (AM)
| RD2-score22=1 1

| RD2-team23=Guarani (SP)
| RD2-score23=0
| RD2-team24='''Atlético (PR)'''
| RD2-score24=2

| RD2-team25=Internacional (RS)
| RD2-score25=0 0
| RD2-team26='''Fortaleza (CE)'''
| RD2-score26=1 0

| RD2-team27='''Bahia (BA)'''
| RD2-score27=2 2
| RD2-team28=Santos (SP)
| RD2-score28=0 0

| RD2-team29=Botafogo (RJ)
| RD2-score29=1 1
| RD2-team30='''Remo (PA)'''
| RD2-score30=2 2

| RD2-team31=Gama (DF)
| RD2-score31=0 0
| RD2-team32='''Ponte Preta (SP)'''
| RD2-score32=0 2

| RD3-team01='''Flamengo (RJ)'''
| RD3-score01=2 1 (pen: 3)
| RD3-team02=Juventude (RS)
| RD3-score02=1 2 (pen: 2)

| RD3-team03='''Coritiba (PR)'''
| RD3-score03=1 4
| RD3-team04=Goiás (GO)
| RD3-score04=1 3

| RD3-team05=Fluminense (RJ)
| RD3-score05=0 0
| RD3-team06='''Grêmio (RS)'''
| RD3-score06=1 0

| RD3-team07=Vitória (BA)
| RD3-score07=0 0
| RD3-team08='''São Paulo (SP)'''
| RD3-score08=3 2

| RD3-team09='''Corinthians (SP)'''
| RD3-score09=8 3
| RD3-team10=Flamengo (PI)
| RD3-score10=1 0

| RD3-team11=Portuguesa (SP)
| RD3-score11=1 1
| RD3-team12='''Atlético (PR)'''
| RD3-score12=3 1

| RD3-team13='''Fortaleza (CE)'''
| RD3-score13=0 3
| RD3-team14=Bahia (BA)
| RD3-score14=0 0

| RD3-team15=Remo (PA)
| RD3-score15=3 2
| RD3-team16='''Ponte Preta (SP)'''
| RD3-score16=2 4

| RD4-team01=Flamengo (RJ)
| RD4-score01=2 1
| RD4-team02='''Coritiba (PR)'''
| RD4-score02=3 1

| RD4-team03='''Grêmio (RS)'''
| RD4-score03=2 4
| RD4-team04=São Paulo (SP)
| RD4-score04=1 3

| RD4-team05='''Corinthians (SP)'''
| RD4-score05=0 1
| RD4-team06=Atlético (PR)
| RD4-score06=0 0

| RD4-team07=Fortaleza (CE)
| RD4-score07=1 2
| RD4-team08='''Ponte Preta (SP)'''
| RD4-score08=0 5

| RD5-team01=Coritiba (PR)
| RD5-score01=1 0
| RD5-team02='''Grêmio (RS)'''
| RD5-score02=3 1

| RD5-team03='''Corinthians (SP)'''
| RD5-score03=2 3
| RD5-team04=Ponte Preta (SP)
| RD5-score04=0 0

| RD6-team01='''Grêmio (RS)'''
| RD6-score01=2 3
| RD6-team02=Corinthians (SP)
| RD6-score02=2 1
}}

{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center; margin: 0 auto;"
|-
!Copa do Brasil<br />2001 Winners
|-
|[[Image:Bandeira do Rio Grande do Sul.svg|100px|Rio Grande do Sul]]<br>'''[[Grêmio Foot-Ball Porto Alegrense|Grêmio]]'''<br/>'''Fourth Title'''
|}

==References==
* [https://web.archive.org/web/20071225181452/http://paginas.terra.com.br/esporte/rsssfbrasil/tables/cbr2001.htm Copa do Brasil 2001 at RSSSF]
*{{in lang|pt}} [http://www.campeoesdofutebol.com.br/art_copabrasil.html Copa do Brasil top scorers at Campeões do Futebol]

{{Copa do Brasil Seasons}}

{{DEFAULTSORT:Copa Do Brasil 2001}}
[[Category:2001 in domestic association football cups]]
[[Category:Copa do Brasil seasons|2001]]
[[Category:2001 in Brazilian football]]
